rule: Clear bags only. Maximum size is 12" x 6" x 12" (30 x 15 x 30 cm). Small clutch bags or purses no larger than 4.5" x 6.5" are permitted and do not need to be clear.
No re-entry. Once you scan your ticket and exit the stadium gates, you cannot re-enter using the same ticket under any circumstances.
Accessible seating options are available on all levels. ADA/accessible entry is recommended via Gate C (South) or Gate E (VIP), both of which feature direct elevator access.
Banned items include: professional camera rigs (lenses > 6 inches), lasers/laser pointers, weapons, explosives, flares, air horns, outside food & beverages, and flags/banners larger than 3' x 5'.
Located at the Guest Services center on the main concourse behind Section 108. Post-event inquiries can be submitted via the official stadium email or website portal.
First Aid stations are staffed by paramedics and located behind Section 112 (main concourse) and Section 224 (upper concourse).
Strollers are allowed but must be checked in at the nearest Guest Services kiosk (behind Section 108 or Section 215) before entering the seating bowl.
